title: PortfolioConfig
description: A model-portfolio definition (risk profile + deterministic construction rules). A model portfolio is a function of (score_run × this config): the same run feeds N portfolios. config_version = md5 of this file, recorded with every built holding so an evolution is always traceable to the rules that produced it.

portfolio_id.description: Canonical id; also the holding/nav partition key. e.g. 'balanced'.

strategy.description: Selection + weighting strategy. momentum: pick/weight by momentum. catalyx: the flagship book, weight by full composite (renamed from 'conviction' 2026-06-06). equal: top-N by composite, equal weight. low_crowding: only uncrowded sectors, weight by composite.

benchmark_etf.description: ETF ticker to measure relative performance against (e.g. ACWI, SPY). null = absolute only.

construction.description: Deterministic rules turning a score_run's sector_snapshot into holdings.

max_positions.description: Cap on number of held sectors.

max_crowding.description: Exclude sectors above this crowding_risk (100 = no cap).

weighting.description: How selected sectors are weighted before the position cap (momentum/composite ∝ that score; equal = same weight).

max_position_pct.description: Per-position weight ceiling (%). Excess water-fills to the rest; if all capped, the remainder is implicit cash.
